title: atriplex nummularia subsp. eunummularia
intro: Atriplex nummularia subsp. eunummularia, also known as Australian saltbush, is a shrub native to Australia, characterized by its small, oval-shaped leaves and greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. Australian saltbush is also believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
